sshd.service                           enabled         enabled
httpd.service                          enabled         disabled
crond.service                          enabled         enabled

firewalld.service                      masked          enabled
cups.service                           disabled        disabled
bluetooth.service                      enabled         enabled
kdump.service                          enabled         enabled
chronyd.service                        enabled         enabled
NetworkManager.service                 enabled         enabled
auditd.service                         enabled         enabled
rsyslog.service                        enabled         enabled
tuned.service                          enabled         enabled
sssd.service                           disabled        disabled
dbus.service                           static          enabled
systemd-resolved.service               static          disabled
foobar.timer                           enabled         disabled
cleanup.timer                          disabled        enabled
